otherRequirements: Apply online for an Electronic Travel Authorization (ETA) before travel; it is issued free of charge and valid for a 30-day stay
You can apply to extend your stay online through the Sri Lanka immigration portal
No visa is needed to transit by air if your connecting flight is within 24 hours of arrival
sourceNote: gov.uk Sri Lanka travel advice — ETA required, free of charge since 25 May 2026, valid for 30 days (https://www.gov.uk/foreign-travel-advice/sri-lanka/entry-requirements)
